ideation: This animation sequence depicts a worker sitting at a desk, actively engaged in their tasks.  The arms will move in a way that suggests focus and concentration, as if typing on a keyboard or reviewing documents. I'll start with a neutral pose, then move to a typing pose, back to neutral, and finally end with a pose suggesting contemplation. The animation will primarily feature the left arm, while the right arm will offer a sense of relaxed balance.  The lack of elbows in the robot's design will be addressed by focusing on shoulder movements for a believable portrayal. Let's begin!

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready for work
left arm moves to type on an imaginary keyboard
hands return to rest, a brief pause
left arm lifts in contemplation, right arm stays put
